title: Hot Springs Locksmith 24/7 | Arkey Lock Auto & Home
metaDesc: 24/7 locksmith in Hot Springs, AR. Emergency lockouts, car key & fob programming, rekeys, lock installs & commercial access. Call (501) 617-8872.
h1: Hot Springs Locksmith — Emergency, Auto, Home & Business
heroSub: Locked out, lost your only car key, or need new locks? Arkey Locksmith is your fast, licensed, local mobile locksmith — answering 24/7 across Hot Springs and the surrounding Arkansas area.

sections.html:
Why Hot Springs Calls Arkey Locksmith

Fast Local Response

We are based right here in Hot Springs and run a fully mobile service, so we reach most of the area quickly — day or night.

15+ Years Experience

From classic deadbolts to push-to-start smart keys, we have seen and solved it. Licensed, insured, and trained on modern vehicles and locks.

Up-Front, Fair Pricing

No surprise fees. We tell you the price before we start, and our car key work runs well below dealership pricing.

Veteran & Senior Discounts

We are proud to give back to the people who built our community with discounts for veterans and seniors.

Our Locksmith Services

One local team for your car, your home, and your business.

24/7

Emergency Lockout

Locked out of your car, home, or business? We come to you, fast.

Learn more →

Automotive Locksmith

Car lockouts, ignition repair, and key & fob programming for most makes.

Learn more →

Car Key Replacement

Lost every key? We cut and program transponder, fob, and smart keys on site.

Learn more →

Residential Locksmith

Rekeys, lock installation, deadbolts, and lockouts for your home.

Learn more →

Commercial Locksmith

Master key systems, access control, and high-security commercial hardware.

Learn more →

RV & Marine Locksmith

Lake country specialist: RV, travel trailer, and boat lock & key service.

Learn more →

Your Local Hot Springs Locksmith

Arkey Locksmith is a locally owned, fully mobile locksmith serving Hot Springs and the communities around it. We are not a national call center that routes your emergency to whoever is cheapest — you reach us, and we show up. Whether you are stranded in a parking lot off Central Avenue, locked out of a rental near Lake Hamilton, or upgrading the locks on a downtown storefront, we handle it with the right tools and honest pricing.

We work on modern vehicles too. Lost the only key to a push-to-start car? We cut and program transponder keys, remote fobs, and proximity (smart) keys on site — usually for far less than the dealership, and without the tow.

Serving Hot Springs & the Surrounding Area

Based in Hot Springs, we serve a real, local radius — including:

  • Hot Springs Village
  • Lake Hamilton
  • Pearcy
  • Magnet Cove
  • Malvern
  • Bismarck & DeGray Lake
  • Mount Ida & Lake Ouachita

We also serve Mountain Pine, Royal, Piney, Jessieville, Lonsdale, Donaldson, and the greater Hot Springs area — 24 hours a day.

faqs.a: Yes. We answer the phone around the clock for lockouts and urgent locksmith needs in Hot Springs and the surrounding area. Call (501) 617-8872 any time and we will get a mobile tech headed your way.

faqs.q: Can you make a car key if I lost all of mine?
faqs.a: Yes. Even if you have no working key, we can cut a key to your vehicle and program transponder, remote fob, and push-to-start (smart) keys on site for most makes and models — usually for much less than a dealership, and with no tow required.

faqs.q: How much does a locksmith cost in Hot Springs?
faqs.a: It depends on the job — a simple home or car lockout is one of our most affordable services, while car key programming or new commercial hardware costs more. We always give you a clear price before we start, with no surprise fees.
Yes. We are a fully mobile locksmith. We come to your car, home, or business anywhere in our Hot Springs service area.
Yes, Arkey Locksmith is a licensed and insured locksmith with 15+ years of experience. You can trust us with your vehicle, home, and business.
Hot Springs and the surrounding area, including Hot Springs Village, Lake Hamilton, Pearcy, Magnet Cove, Malvern, Bismarck, and Mount Ida, plus nearby communities.
